title: JetFixtureRegionMap
description: Region-map sidecar consumed by the jet pixel-parity comparator (ADR-011, issue #2147). One file per fixture, named `<fixture>.regions.json`, sitting next to the fixture's screenshot baselines. Each entry tags a rectangle of the rendered surface with one of four tolerance tiers; the comparator routes each region to the matching pixelmatch / SSIM / video-record path. Untagged pixels default to tier-b AND raise a comparator warning so authors notice missing coverage.

schema_version.description: Sidecar shape version. Bumped on incompatible changes; the comparator refuses mismatched versions rather than guessing.

fixture_id.description: Kebab-case slug matching the fixture directory name. Used to pair this sidecar with its screenshot baselines.

viewport.description: Optional viewport metadata. Purely advisory — the comparator does not validate rect coordinates against it because deviceScaleFactor and clip rects can legitimately move them out of nominal viewport bounds.

regions.description: Ordered list of tagged rectangles. Later entries override earlier ones on overlap, so an author can stamp a coarse tier-b background and then carve out a tier-a glyph patch on top. Comparator iterates in array order.

tier.description: Tolerance tier. tier-a = text glyphs (pixelmatch threshold 0.05, antialiasing true). tier-b = vector shapes (pixelmatch threshold 0.02, antialiasing false). tier-c = gradients / shadows (pixelmatch threshold 0.15 AND SSIM >= 0.98). tier-d = animation (excluded from pixel diff; recorded to webm). Thresholds are pinned in ADR-011 and are not configurable from this sidecar.

rect.description: Rectangle in CSS pixels, fixture-root coordinates, top-left origin. Stored as [x, y, w, h] (not {x, y, w, h}) to keep the sidecar compact and diff-friendly. Sub-pixel values are rejected — pixelmatch operates on integer pixel grids.

label.description: Human-readable region name surfaced in DiffReport rows (#2151 diff viewer). Examples: "button-label", "button-border", "ripple-gradient", "focus-ring-transition". Free-form but should be stable across runs so triage can grep by label.

note.description: Optional triage note explaining why this rect was tagged this tier. Not consumed by the comparator; survives into DiffReport for human readers.
